titleStmt.title: SII 26.296: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 296. (A.R. No. 281 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of one nandā lamp to the same temple of the same Tirukkachchūr occurring in No. 295 above by the same person who figures as the donor in No. 290 above, but who is stated, here, to belong to Mullaipāḍi, in the same nāḍu, kōṭṭam and maṇḍalam. It is stated that 32 cows and one bull which he donated for the purpose of burning the lamp, were entrusted to maṉrāḍi Āṭkoṇḍak-kōṉ, his son Āḍavallāṉ and the latter's younger brother Śiṟṟi of Śeṅguṉṟam in the nāḍu of the same name, who had agreed to measure out daily one uḻakku of ghee by the measure called Irāśakēsari.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīku
lottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷa
ttūrkkoṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut tirukkaccūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya nāyanāṟku
Innāṭṭuc ceṅkuṉṟattilirukkum maṉṟāṭi Āṭkoṇṭakkoṉūm Ivaṉ makaṉ Āṭavallāṉum Iva
ṉ tampi ciṟṟiyum Ivvaṉaivom Innāyanāṟku Erippatāna tirununtāviḷakku 1 viḷakku Oṉṟukku
nāḷ Oṉṟukku Irācakecariyāl Aḷappatāna ney Uḻakkukku poliyūṭṭāka In nāyanārkku Imaṇṭalattu Ikkoṭṭattu I
nnāṭṭu mullaippāṭit tiruccurakkaṇṇappaṉ Ātināyakaṉ pañcanativāṇaṉ rājarāja nilakaṅkaraiyaṉ viṭṭa curapiyāy nāṅkaḷ
kaikkoṇṭa naṟpacu 3 10 2m Iṣapam kam pacu muppattiraṇṭum Iṣapam Oṉṟum kaikkoṇṭu cantrādittava
ṟ celuttak kaṭavomākac cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ivvaṉaivom Itu panmāheśvara ra
kṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.296 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
